## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` is green.
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` is clean.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Docs touched if the change affects user-facing behaviour.
- [ ] No new outbound network calls beyond the user's IMAP/SMTP host.
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or, if there is, it is justified in the PR description).
